hero.title: Home is better
hero.subtitle: Connecting elders with young people for affordable, meaningful intergenerational living.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Tell us about yourself, your lifestyle, and what you're looking for in a housemate.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our AI analyzes your personality and lifestyle answers to find your ideal compatibility profile.
howItWorks.step3Desc: See ranked matches with compatibility scores, and send a connection request with a personal message.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Once both parties accept, contact info is shared and you can take the next steps together.

benefits.title: Why Intergenerational Living?
benefits.b1Desc: Elders share their space at below-market rates; youth gain affordable, stable housing.
benefits.b2Desc: Combat loneliness for both generations — meaningful daily connection and mutual support.
benefits.b3Desc: Youth offer tech help, errands, or companionship hours. Elders share wisdom and stability.
benefits.b4Desc: Building bridges between generations, one home at a time.

cta.title: Ready to find your match?
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of households already living better, together.

about.title: About Our Mission
about.mission: Logement Intergénérationnel was born from a simple observation: elders often have more space than they need, and young people can't find affordable housing. We believe that bringing these two groups together creates something much richer than a real-estate transaction.
about.v1: Dignity and respect for all ages

auth.errorWeak: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.errorExists: An account with this email already exists.

account.title: Welcome back
account.noConnections: No connections yet — browse matches to get started!
account.profileIncomplete: Complete your profile to unlock match results.

profile.title: Your Profile
profile.subtitle: This information is used to find your best matches.
profile.bioPlaceholder: Tell potential housemates a little about yourself...
profile.vibeSubtitle: Answer honestly — these are analyzed by AI to find your personality match.
profile.q1: How do you prefer to spend a Friday evening?
profile.q3: What does your ideal home atmosphere feel like?
profile.q4: How do you handle disagreements or conflicts?
profile.q5: How do you usually connect with new people?
profile.q6: What topics or hobbies are you passionate about?
profile.q7: How do you feel about noise in shared spaces?
profile.q8: Are you a morning person or night owl? Describe your daily schedule.
profile.vibePrefsSubtitle: Use the sliders to describe your ideal housemate's personality.
profile.deleteConfirm: Are you sure? This cannot be undone.
profile.locationElderHint: Elders: enter your actual location so young people nearby can find you.
profile.locationYouthHint: Youth: enter your preferred area. Elders near this location will rank higher.
profile.interestsPlaceholder: Type an interest and press Enter...
profile.languagesPlaceholder: Type a language and press Enter...
profile.tagHint: Press Enter or comma to add. Backspace to remove last.

matching.title: Find Your Match
matching.subtitle: Ranked by personality compatibility, lifestyle fit, and housing needs.
matching.noMatches: No matches found yet. Make sure your profile is complete.
